# SEO AI Co™

> AI-powered programmatic SEO infrastructure for local service businesses in the United States. One brand per market. One licensee per territory. Structured service and location pages deployed at scale — built to hold search position and expand over time.

## What This System Does

SEO AI Co™ builds and deploys programmatic SEO infrastructure for local service businesses. The system generates hyper-local structured pages for every service-city combination in a licensed territory, establishing search presence across an operator's full market before competitors can claim the same ground.

This is not a content tool or an SEO plugin. It is infrastructure — structured page architecture, internal link systems, search signals, and ongoing optimization deployed under a single territory licence.

## Core Principles

- **One licensee per market.** Each territory supports one primary brand. Once secured, no competitor can hold the same market position under the same system.
- **Hyper-local URL architecture.** Every service-city combination in the licensed territory receives a dedicated structured page.
- **LLM-aware structure.** Pages are built for organic search, AI-assisted visibility, and discovery across AI tools and search assistants.
- **Compounding position.** Search presence compounds over time as the system expands coverage and strengthens signals across the territory.
- **AI-guided deployment.** Pages are generated, deployed, and optimized systematically at scale.

## Access Tiers

- **Launch** — Entry-level market access. Initial system deployment, structured rollout, AI-driven foundation. Reviewed individually based on market availability.
- **Expansion** — $2,995/mo. Expanded service and city coverage, continuous rollout, competitive reinforcement, performance tracking. Structured 4-month deployment cycle.
- **Dominance** — $4,799/mo. Full market expansion, priority deployment, advanced signal reinforcement, strategic oversight and market lock. Structured 4-month deployment cycle with priority processing.

Access is limited. Markets are not open by default.

## Execution Services (Separate from the SEO System)

Available execution services complement the SEO infrastructure but are not included in access plans:

- **Web Design & Development** — Custom websites, redesigns, landing pages, and technical alignment with the SEO system
- **WordPress Support** — WordPress development, maintenance, performance optimization, and content management
- **Ads Management** — Google Ads, local search campaigns, LSAs, and paid advertising aligned with market expansion
- **Branding & Print** — Brand identity systems, business cards, collateral, signage design, and brand refresh

## Sitemap

https://seoaico.com/sitemap.xml

## Who This Is For

Local service businesses in the United States that need to establish and hold search presence across multiple cities and service categories — HVAC, roofing, plumbing, landscaping, electrical, pest control, cleaning, and similar industries. Businesses moving to establish market position before competitors claim the same ground.

## Who Operates This System

SEO AI Co™ is the operator and infrastructure provider. Access is licensed on a per-territory basis. The company is based in the United States and serves local service businesses nationwide.
